name: @voidwasm/ffmpeg
description: A high-performance WebAssembly FFmpeg plugin built with the Void framework and executed via @voidwasm/runtime inside Node.js (functioning seamlessly as a Void plugin, just like Vite and Vite plugins). It enables native, cross-platform media processing—such as video resizing, cropping, trimming, video concatenation/merging, thumbnail extraction, and audio isolation—directly in JavaScript through a synchronous host filesystem bridge.
